description: baseline: GI=2 dlr=1e-5 slr=5e-6 CLIP disc 3K data (worse than untrained)
exp1: GI=3 dlr=1e-5 slr=5e-6 M=0.5 CLIP
exp2: GI=5 dlr=1e-5 slr=5e-6 M=0.5 (worse than GI=3)
exp3: GI=3 M=1.0 (was 0.5) — big improvement +15.5% BEST
exp4: GI=3 M=1.5 (too much noise logit_gap=1.3)
exp5: GI=3 M=1.0 dlr=5e-5 (higher disc LR worse)
exp6: GI=3 M=1.0 disc_layers=[10,20,29] (weaker disc worse)
exp8: slr=1e-5 (was 5e-6) GI=3 M=1.0 (much worse, overshoots)
exp9: disc_hidden=128 (was 256) GI=3 M=1.0 (weaker disc worse)
exp10: LR_WARMUP=50 (was 0) GI=3 M=1.0 (warmup didn't help)
